description: AWS Secret Access Key (40-char base64 near AWS context)
Google Cloud Service Account JSON key file
Supabase Service Role Key (full database access)
AWS MFA Device ARN (may leak account structure)

pattern: -----BEGIN RSA PRIVATE KEY-----[\s\S]*?-----END RSA PRIVATE KEY-----
description: GitHub App Private Key (full PEM block)
Stripe Live Publishable Key (limited risk but indicates live environment)
Supabase Anon/Public Key (limited but should not be in server code)
Neon Database Connection String with credentials
New Relic Browser Agent License Key
1Password Connect Server Token (JWT with specific header)
SSH Public Key (may indicate leaked key pair nearby)
Telegram Bot API URL with token
GitHub Actions Secret Reference (informational - check for hardcoded alternatives nearby)
SendGrid API Key ID (partial - check for full key nearby)
Supabase PostgreSQL Connection String with credentials
Firebase/GCP Admin SDK Private Key in JSON
OpenAI Organization ID (may leak org info)
CockroachDB Cloud Connection String with credentials
Hardcoded IP Address with Embedded Credentials
